training_status: lifting 4x per week, 4-5 cardio sessions per week (30-45 min each)

benefits.description: Body fat % decreased slightly; total weight loss from 365 to 285 lbs over ~1 year
Implied by GLP-1 RA mechanism; enabled adherence to 1800-2200 cal daily intake

protocol_notes: Started at 365 lbs, currently 285 lbs, goal 200 lbs. On 15 mg dose for last 10 weeks with no additional weight loss but body composition improving. Consuming 1800-2200 calories daily with 200-220g protein. Considering switching to Retatrutide and/or Retatrutide + Cagrilintide.
